notableEvents.label: Paul Goldschmidt pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Paul Goldschmidt flies out sharply to center fielder Garrett Mitchell.

notableEvents.label: Amed Rosario pinch-hit

notableEvents.label: Garrett Mitchell GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Garrett Mitchell grounds into a double play, second baseman Jazz Chisholm Jr. to shortstop José Caballero to first baseman Ben Rice. Luis Rengifo out at 2nd. Garrett Mitchell out at 1st.
